title: RG10 0QR, Faccenda Foods Limited : permit surrender issued - EPR/LP3937ME/S004
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter, decision document for:    Operator name: Faccenda Foods Limited   Installation name: Baldasarra Farm Poultry Unit   Permit number: EPR/LP3937ME/S004   "
